case_title: SMITH, MICHAEL VS SAN LEANDRO COLLECTION SERVICE INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,678.17 FILED BY SMITH, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SAN LEANDRO COLLECTION SERVICE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO PETER LEVY RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN LEANDRO COLLECTION SERVICE INC. MUNI CT JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 11/5/93, AGAINST PLFT SMITH IN THE AMT OF $2768.59 (090531) PLFT HEREIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PRF, PLFT SMSITH SHALL PAY TO DEFT THE TOTTAL SUM OF $1368.59 & $15 COSTS PLFT SMITH SHALL MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENT OF $200 TO
DEFT UNTIL THE ENTIRE AMT OF $1383. HAS BEEN PD TO DFET UNTIL FURTHER ORDER FR THE CT. DEFT SHALL WITHDRAW THE WAGE GARNISHMENT AGAINST PLFT.
DEFT RETAINS ALL LEGAL REMEDIES SHLD PLFT FAILE TO MAKE TIMELY MONTHY PAYMENTS, PLFT SHALL COMMENCE P AYMENTS IN JAN. 1994.
